title: Dashboard enhancements and bug fixes
body:
* **Error bars on line charts**: Line charts now support displaying error bars as bands.
* **Custom SQL measure bug fix (Public Preview)**: Fixed a bug where a measure defined using the custom SQL option would fail if a dataset-scoped measure didn't specify the full name path. For example, `sum(orders.field)` was previously required rather than `sum(field)`.
* **Genie Code dashboard visualization authoring**: Genie Code can now author the full set of dashboard visualization configuration options.
